home.heroTitle: Equipment, parts and service support for industrial operations
home.heroText: Longqing International Trading helps industrial customers coordinate supply, repair, restoration and service support according to technical requirements and purchasing conditions.
home.heroNote: Careful sourcing. Clear communication. Conservative commitments.
home.aboutTitle: A focused trading partner for industrial requirements
home.aboutText: We work with customers who need practical support in international sourcing, technical solution selection and coordination of supply for industrial equipment, spare parts and consumables.
home.contactText: Share the basic requirement, equipment category, operating conditions or part description. We will review the request and respond with next steps.

services: Supply of spare parts and consumables
Repair and restoration of industrial equipment
Technical solution selection according to customer requirements
why: No unsupported claims or inflated promises
Attention to documentation and technical fit
Coordination across sourcing, supply and service steps
process: Select a suitable supply or service route
Coordinate delivery, repair or support steps

pages.aboutLead: Longqing International Trading is a B2B trading company focused on industrial equipment, spare parts, consumables, repair, restoration and service support.
pages.aboutBody: The company works with careful, requirement-based communication. We do not position ourselves through unsupported claims; instead, we focus on understanding the customer request, clarifying technical needs and coordinating practical supply or service routes.
pages.servicesLead: Our scope is intentionally clear: industrial supply, repair, restoration, service support and sourcing coordination.
pages.industriesLead: We support customers operating equipment and industrial systems in demanding sectors where technical accuracy and reliable coordination matter.
pages.contactsLead: Send a request and include as much technical context as possible. Drawings, part descriptions and operating conditions can be shared during follow-up communication.
pages.privacyLead: We process contact details and inquiry information only to respond to business requests and maintain related communication.
pages.cookiesLead: This website is designed to operate with minimal cookies. If analytics or additional services are added later, this policy should be updated.
pages.legalLead: Information on this website is provided for general business communication and does not constitute a binding commercial offer unless confirmed in a separate written agreement.
pages.thankYouLead: Your inquiry has been received. We will review the information and respond with the next practical steps.

form.name: Name
form.consent: I agree that my information may be processed to respond to this inquiry.
